title: Open Laptops Category
goal: Open the Laptops category from the Demoblaze storefront and stop on the filtered listing.
instruction: On the Demoblaze storefront, open the Laptops category and stop when the filtered laptop listing is visible.
review_notes: First Demoblaze retail-navigation task. It fits the modern-app retail slice by requiring category filtering on a client-rendered storefront.

steps.explanation: I waited briefly for the storefront product grid to finish loading.
I opened the Laptops category to filter the storefront listing.

action.summary: I opened the Laptops category and stopped when the filtered listing was visible.

steps.explanation: The laptop-only product list is visible now, so I am ending the task.
